task.title: Investigate Latency Spikes
task.description: API latency spikes under moderate load.

steps.thought: Need better visibility into request patterns.
Implement request tracing with size limits.
steps.observation: Tracer module created with bounded storage

steps.thought: Integrate tracer into the request handler.
Add endpoint to view trace patterns.
Generate some traffic to collect trace data.

steps.observation: Latency remains stable with minimal overhead

steps.thought: Tracer provides useful data without resource impact.

arguments.message: Implemented bounded request tracing to identify latency patterns. Tracer uses deque with size limit to prevent unbounded growth while providing pattern analysis.
